page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: BSCI213 or BSC1I223.

BSCI222 Principles of Genetics (4 Credits)

Principles and mechanisms of heredity and gene expression. Considers plant, animal, and microbial organisms.

Prerequisite: BSCI170 and BSCI171 or (BIOE120 and BIOE1 21);

and CHEM131 and CHEM132; and either (BSCI160 and BSCI161) or (CHEM231 and CHEM232).
